hooks.description: Scan for clinical claims missing evidence level annotations (GRADE/CEBM)
Pattern-match drug names and flag critical interaction pairs
Verify clinical content includes a disclaimer or educational-purpose notice
Scan for PHI patterns (MRN, DOB, phone, email) for HIPAA/GDPR compliance
Check for absolute claims, unsupported superlatives, and appropriate uncertainty language
Display welcome message with available medical commands and active hooks

hooks.command: echo '\n⚠️  Clinical Review Reminder: All medical content generated in this session should be reviewed by a qualified healthcare professional before use in patient care. AI-generated content does not constitute medical advice.\n'
hooks.description: Remind user to perform clinical review before using any generated content
